description: User clicks on the 'Locate your Askable wallet' task in the sidebar menu.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the second item in the left sidebar, and the main content area begins to update.

description: The application navigates to the results page for the 'Locate your Askable wallet' prototype test.
frame_description: The main content area refreshes to show the 'Locate your Askable wallet' task results, including misclick rate and path analysis.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Locate your Askable wallet' sidebar item while viewing its results.
frame_description: The cursor remains stationary over the selected sidebar item.

description: User clicks on the 'Make a withdrawal from your Wallet' task in the sidebar menu.
frame_description: The cursor moves down to the third sidebar item and clicks it, triggering a page update.

description: The application navigates to the results page for the 'Make a withdrawal from your Wallet' prototype test.
frame_description: The main content area updates to show the results for the withdrawal task.

description: User scrolls down the results page to view additional path analysis details.
frame_description: The page content shifts upwards as the user scrolls down.
